caption: A man in a dark suit and black face mask walks across a paved area toward a white tour bus, which features a logo and the text "Real Madrid" on its side. He is accompanied by other men, including some wearing casual athletic attire with backpacks and one man in a bright yellow safety vest. The setting is an outdoor area with brick walls and a prominent red architectural pillar. In the beginning, the man in the suit moves forward while others stand or walk behind him; as the sequence progresses, he continues his trajectory across the frame. Another man in a suit is also visible, walking toward the bus in the background. The background includes several people standing near the bus and a metal barrier. The movement is linear, with the subjects shifting from the left side of the scene toward the right as they approach the vehicle.
